    how ICU supports locales]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Understand
    the datatypes that ICU supports]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {#Definitions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Definitions]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [ ]{.text-T6}[Internationalization (I18n)]{.text-T10}

    [  ]{.text-T6}[The process of developing software that supports
    different languages, character sets or sets of cultural dependencies
    without modifying the software.]{.text-T6}

    []{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Definitions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Definitions]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [             ]{.text-T11}[Localization (L10n)]{.text-T10}

    [  ]{.text-T12}[The process of adapting software to support a
    specific language, character set and cultural dependencies. This
    process may include translating the user interface and pieces of
    technical communication.]{.text-T12}

    []{.text-T12}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Unicode_Reminders .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Unicode Reminders

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Unicode is
    character set that is a superset of most other major character
    sets[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Unicode
    provides data portability across locales, languages and character
    set boundaries[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Unicode_Reminders .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Unicode Reminders

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Unicode
    supports a variety of character encodings:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UTF-16,
        UCS-2 (Double-byte)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UTF-8
        (8-bit Multi-byte)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UTF-7
        (7-bit Multi-byte)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.  For more information about Unicode, visit the Unicode Consortium
    website at:

     

    -   -   -   [www.unicode.org]{.text-T13}

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#I18n_and_Performance .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [I18n and Performance]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Internationalization
    may have a performance impact on your
    product]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Always
    consider performance implications during design of internationalized
    product]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {#ICU .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ICU

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU is an
    acronym for International Components for Unicode[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU is an
    open-source project licensed by IBM[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.  For

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_ICU .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More ICU

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU was
    originally developed as the Java I18n libraries for JDK
    1.1[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Developed by
    the Unicode Group at IBM in Cupertino, California[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU is
    currently available as both a C libraries and C++ and Java class
    libraries[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_ICU .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More ICU

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}No
    "official" standard exists for ICU[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The API is
    owned and evolved by IBM and the open source community[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Locale_Reminder .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Locale Reminder

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A locale
    defines:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        set]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        encoding]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Cultural
        Dependencies (Date/Time formats)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Territory]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A locale is
    not necessarily  a country]{.text-T6}[!]{.text-T12}[
    ]{.text-T19}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T19}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Locale_Naming_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Locale Naming Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.014cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A locale in
    ICU has the following naming format:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [language-code_country-code\[.variant-code\]]{.text-T20}

    []{.text-T20}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Locale_Naming_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Locale Naming Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    [language-code]{.text-T21} is a two lower-case letter designation of
    the language defined by ISO-639[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    [country-code]{.text-T21} is a two upper-case letter designation of
    the country defined by ISO-3166[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    The ISO-639 standard and ISO-3166 standard can be found at a variety
    of websites.

     

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Locale_Naming_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Even More Locale Naming Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    [variant-code]{.text-T21} is an application specific string
    designation platform or other dependencies[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Locale_Naming_Examples .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Locale Naming Examples

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Examples
    include:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[en_US]{.text-T22}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[fr_FR]{.text-T22}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[fr_FR.EURO]{.text-T22}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[de_DE.Windows]{.text-T22}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T22}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Creating_a_Locale_Object .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Creating a Locale Object

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Here is an
    example of creating a locale object:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [newLocale = new Locale(fr, FR);]{.text-T23}

    []{.text-T23}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Predefined_Locales .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Predefined Locales

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU has a
    number of predefined locales []{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}These ease
    the creation of common locales[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Examples:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  [newLocale = new Locale::US;]{.text-T24}

        [newLocale = new Locale::GERMANY;]{.text-T24}

        []{.text-T24}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    Predefined ICU Locale objects include:

     

    Locale.CANADA

    Locale.CANADA_FRENCH

    Locale.CHINA

    Locale.CHINESE

    Locale.ENGLISH

    Locale.FRANCE

    Locale.FRENCH

    Locale.GERMAN

    Locale.GERMANY

    Locale.ITALIAN

    Locale.ITALY

    Locale.JAPAN

    \\Locale.JAPANESE

    Locale.KOREA

    Locale.KOREAN

    Locale.PRC

    Locale.SIMPLIFIED_CHINESE

    Locale.TAIWAN

    Locale.TRADITIONAL_CHINESE

    Locale.UK

    Locale.US

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Default_Locale_Object .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Default Locale Object

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Internationalized
    software should use the locale defined in the runtime
    environment[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Example:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [userLocale = Locale.getDefault ();]{.text-T24}

    []{.text-T24}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Other_Locale_Objects .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Other Locale Objects

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Your
    software may want to use other locales for a portion of your
    application[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}You can
    create as many locale objects as you wish[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}You may then
    pass a specific locale object to other locale-sensitive
    classes[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Checking_Locale_Support .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Checking Locale Support

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}All
    locale-sensitive class support the
    [getAvailableLocales()]{.text-T21} method[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Use this
    method to verify support for specific locales[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Locale_Object_Methods .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Locale Object Methods

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Each locale
    object supports methods to display information about the
    locale[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.   

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Locale_Object_Methods .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Locale Object Methods

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr10 style="height:10.553cm;width:22.013cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.693cm; top:5.715cm; "}
+:---------------------------------+:---------------------------------+
| 1.  [Method]{.text-T15}          | 1.  [Purpose]{.text-T15}         |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [getCountry()]{.text-T25}    | 1.  [Gets the ISO Country        |
|                                  |     Code]{.text-T16}             |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [getLanguage()]{.text-T25}   | 1.  [Gets the ISO Language       |
|                                  |     Code]{.text-T16}             |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.                               | 1.  [Gets the displayable        |
| [getDisplayCountry()]{.text-T25} |     country name]{.text-T16}     |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [                            | 1.  [Gets the displayable        |
| getDisplayLanguage()]{.text-T25} |     language name]{.text-T16}    |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [getDi                       | 1.  [Gets the displayable        |
| splayCountry(Locale)]{.text-T25} |     country name for the         |
|                                  |     specified locale]{.text-T16} |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [getDis                      | 1.  [Gets the displayable        |
| playLanguage(Locale)]{.text-T25} |     language name for the        |
|                                  |     specified locale]{.text-T16} |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:10.553cm;width:22.013cm;"}
:::

<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Data_Types .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr1 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:7.407cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Data Types]{.text-T9}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Programming_Data_Types .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Programming Data Types

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Programming
    language commonly use the following data types:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[char]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[wchar_t]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   []{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Programming_Data_Types .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Programming Data Types

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}But these
    datatypes may vary depending on:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Character
        encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Compilers[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Operating
        system[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Hardware
        processor[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ICU_Data_Types .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ICU Data Types

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    a consistent data type across software/platforms[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Data type is
    [uChar]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Unsigned
        16-bit integer[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UTF-16
        character encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_ICU_Data_Types .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More ICU Data Types

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Use the ICU
    [uChar]{.text-T21} data type just as a [char]{.text-T21} would be
    used with ASCII:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Allocate
        arrays of [uChar]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Implement
        pointer (increment operator will move to next UTF-16
        character[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Data_Type_Domains .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Data Type Domains

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[uChar]{.text-T21}
    is used internal to ICU code[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}In-coming/out-going
    data may use a different character encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}You need to
    manage character encoding conversions of data crossing that
    boundary[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Character_Encoding_Conversion .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr1 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.117cm; top:7.619cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Character Encoding Conversion]{.text-T9}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page40 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Character Encoding Conversion

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    a character encoding conversion capability called a
    [Converter]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A
    [Converter]{.text-T21} is implemented using a:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[UnicodeConverter]{.text-T21}
        object in C++[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[UConverter]{.text-T21}
        structure in C[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-    

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Character_Encoding_Conversion .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Character Encoding Conversion

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}An ICU
    [Converter]{.text-T21} always converts to/from the internal  
     UTF-16 encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ICU_Converter_Creation .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ICU Converter Creation

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}An ICU
    [Converter]{.text-T21} is usually created by identifying a character
    encoding name[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ICU_Converter_Creation_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [ICU Converter Creation Example]{.text-T26}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.853cm;width:23.072cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.079cm; "}
<div>

1.  [C]{.text-T27}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  []{.text-T18}

    [ucnv_open("EUC_jp", &err_code);]{.text-T18}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  []{.text-T28}

    [C++]{.text-T27}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  []{.text-T18}

    [UnicodeConverter conv("EUC_jp", ]{.text-T18}

    [        ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T18}[   
        ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T18}[       
    ]{.text-T18}[error);]{.text-T18}

    []{.text-T18}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ICU_Converter_Close .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ICU Converter Close

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Code to
    close an ICU [Converter]{.text-T21} is:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [C]{.text-T27}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [ucnv_close();]{.text-T21}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [C++]{.text-T27}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [delete conv;]{.text-T21}

    []{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ICU_Conversion__C_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ICU Conversion (C)

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:23.072cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [        ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T24}[\...]{.text-T24}

    [converter = ucnv_open("EUC_jp",&status);]{.text-T29}

    [/\* Convert from  Unicode to EUC_jp]{.text-T29}

    [#\_chars = ucnv_fromUChar(converter, ]{.text-T29}[       
    ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[       
    ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[output, output_len, ]{.text-T29}

    [        ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[   
        ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[src, src_len, ]{.text-T29}[   
        ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[       
    ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[       
    ]{.text-T29}[&status);]{.text-T29}

    [ucnv_close(converter)]{.text-T29}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[\...]{.text-T24}

    []{.text-T24}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.  There is also a [ucnv_toUChar()]{.text-T30} function to convert from
    EUC_jp to Unicode.

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ICU_Conversion__C___ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ICU Conversion (C++)

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  []{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}[\...]{.text-T24}

    [UnicodeConverter conv("EUC_jp", error);]{.text-T29}

    [conv.fromUnicodeString(output,output_size, ]{.text-T29}

    [        ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[   
        ]{.text-T29}[        ]{.text-T29}[inputString,
    status)]{.text-T29}

    [delete conv;]{.text-T29}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}[\...]{.text-T24}

    []{.text-T24}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Conversion_Modes .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Conversion Modes

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:23.072cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    following conversion modes are supported:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Single-String
        -- data is contained in a string]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        -- single character conversion]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Buffer
        -- buffered data approach, most efficient and
        flexible]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Convenience
        -- for conversion to  another character encoding via
        Unicode]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    For more information on Converter modes, refer to the webpage:

     

    oss.software.ibm.com/icu/userguide/codepageConverters.html

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Conversion_Reminder .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Conversion Reminder

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}There are
    some occasions where an in-coming character will not exist in the
    Unicode Standard[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    Converter will replace that character with a standard substitution
    in the converted data[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr1 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:7.407cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Internationalization Issues]{.text-T9}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page50 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Internationalization Issues]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This
    section covers each of the issues described in the
    Internationalization Issues course]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU
    approaches to addressing each issue are also
    covered]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Storage_and_Display .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Storage and Display]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr9 style="height:8.824cm;width:10.385cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.539cm; top:8.467cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Hard-coded
        Text ]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Ambiguous
        Text]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Messages
        Used Multiple Times]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Yes/No
        Questions]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Text
        Buffering]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T33}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr10 style="height:9.525cm;width:11.96cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:11.853cm; top:8.466cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Text
        Backspacing]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Data
        Array Pointers]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        Set Assumptions]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        Encoding Assumptions]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Hard-coded_Text_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Hard-coded Text ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU stores
    hard-coded text in a ResourceBundle, separate from the executable
    product[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ResourceBundles
    can contain:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Text[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Icons[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Other
        locale-specific information[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ResourceBundle_Names .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ResourceBundle Names

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr11 style="height:11.642cm;width:21.802cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ResourceBundles
    are named using the following format:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   []{.text-T18}

1.  [base-name_locale-identifier]{.text-T21}

-   []{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_ResourceBundle_Names .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More ResourceBundle Names

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    [base-name]{.text-T21} is given to the ResourceBundle by your
    product at time of development[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The
    [locale-identifier]{.text-T21} designates language, country and
    variant, just as a [locale]{.text-T21} name[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ResourceBundle_Name_Examples .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ResourceBundle Name Examples

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Examples:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   1.  [myresource_fr_ca]{.text-T18}

            [myresource_ru_RU]{.text-T18}

            [myresource_it_IT_EUR]{.text-T18}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Localized_Resources .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Localized Resources

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Each
    ResourceBundle does not have to contain all of the values found in
    the original ResourceBundle[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Only
    translated values will appear in localized
    ResourceBundles[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Un-translated
    values will be found in the original language
    ResourceBundle[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ResourceBundle_Search_Hierarchy .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ResourceBundle Search Hierarchy

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A sequence
    of ResourceBundles will be searched for the appropriate resource
    value[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Search will
    proceed from most specific ResourceBundle to more general
    ones[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ResourceBundle_Search_Hierarchy_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ResourceBundle Search Hierarchy Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:23.072cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Searching
    for [myresource_de_DE_Euro]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The search
    will look for:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[myresource_de_DE_Euro]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[myresource_de_DE]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[myresource_de]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[myresource
         ]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   1.  [(the default language)]{.text-T18}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ResourceBundle_Contents .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ResourceBundle Contents

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ResourceBundles
    can contain two types of resources:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr10 style="height:8.234cm;width:17.144cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:4.233cm; top:9.102cm; "}
+:-------------------------------+:-----------------------------------+
| 1.  [Resource Type]{.text-T35} | 1.  [Description]{.text-T35}       |
+--------------------------------+------------------------------------+
| 1.  [Scalar]{.text-T36}        | 1.  [Can contain one value, either |
|                                |     a Unicode string integer or    |
|                                |     binary data]{.text-T36}        |
+--------------------------------+------------------------------------+
| 1.  [Complex]{.text-T36}       | 1.  [Can contain other resources   |
|                                |     (i.e., tables,                 |
|                                |     arrays)]{.text-T36}            |
+--------------------------------+------------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:8.234cm;width:17.144cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Preparing_the_ResourceBundle .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Preparing the ResourceBundle

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:24.553cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.846cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ResourceBundles
    cannot be used in their text form[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}They must be
    compiled using the "[genrb]{.text-T21}" command[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Output will
    be file:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [base-name_locale-identifier.res]{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ResourceBundle_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ResourceBundle Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:24.553cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.846cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [File ]{.text-T27}[myrb ]{.text-T37}[(before
    compilation)]{.text-T27}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  []{.text-T21}

    [\...]{.text-T21}

    [HELLO:"What's happening?"]{.text-T21}

    [\...]{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page62 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ResourceBundle Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:24.553cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.846cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [\...]{.text-T21}

    [ResourceBundle bdl = ResourceBundle.getBundle("myrb");]{.text-T18}

    [System.out.println(]{.text-T18}

    [          ]{.text-T18}[bdl.getString("HELLO"));]{.text-T18}

    [\...]{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P57 .graphic-pr12 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    The program will output ["What's happening?"]{.text-T38}

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Ambiguous_Text .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Ambiguous Text]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU does
    not provide any support for Ambiguous Text]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    developers are responsible for reviewing, clarifying and re-writing
    all messages before translation]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Messages_Used_Multiple_Times .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Messages Used Multiple Times]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU
    provides no support for messages that are used multiple
    times]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    developer is responsible for reviewing messages to remove message
    used multiple times for different purposes]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  []{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Yes_No_Questions_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Yes/No Questions ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.715cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    no support for internationalization of Yes/No
    questions[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The "Yes"
    and "No" terms should be located in a ResourceBundle[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Buffering .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Buffering]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU
    supports text buffering of international
    characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[All
    international character data types are
    ]{.text-T6}[uChar]{.text-T39}[ (UTF-16)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Simply
    allocate the buffer for the appropriate number of
    ]{.text-T6}[uChar]{.text-T39}[ text
    characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Data_Array_Pointers___Text_Backspacing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Data Array Pointers & Text Backspacing]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The use of
    the ]{.text-T6}[uChar]{.text-T39}[ data type ensures that character
    pointers are always incremented/decremented by a character (2
    bytes)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Character_Set_Assumptions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Character Set Assumptions]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU assumes
    that all character data consists of Unicode
    (]{.text-T6}[uChar]{.text-T39}[) characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU does
    not prevent the developer from including other dependencies on
    character set into the code]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Character_Encoding_Assumptions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Character Encoding Assumptions]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU assumes
    that all character data consists of ]{.text-T6}[uChar]{.text-T39}[
    (UTF-16) characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU does
    not prevent the developer from including other dependencies on
    character encoding into the code]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  []{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Processing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Processing]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr9 style="height:8.824cm;width:10.385cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.751cm; top:8.678cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Text
        Input]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Text
        Concatenation ]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        Classification]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        Sorting]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Hyphenation]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T33}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr10 style="height:9.525cm;width:11.96cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:12.488cm; top:8.677cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Text
        Delimiters]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Punctuation]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Capitalization]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Text
        Search]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Spell
        Checking]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P31 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Input .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Input]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU
    provides transparent connections to operating system Input Methods
    for large character set languages (i.e., Japanese and
    Chinese)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Developers
    do not need to add or modify code to support Input
    Methods]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Concatenation_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Concatenation ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Remember,
    output message word order may be different after
    translation]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[General
    advice is to avoid text concatenation]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Text_Concatenation .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Text Concatenation

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    two classes to support text concatenation:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[MessageFormat]{.text-T21}
        -- produces concatenated messages in a   language-neutral
        way[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[ChoiceFormat]{.text-T21}
        -- supports singular/plurals in messages[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Character_Classification .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Character Classification]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Do not
    develop your product with assumptions about alphabetic
    characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Watch out
    for functions or methods like
    ]{.text-T6}[isalpha()]{.text-T39}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Not all
    language have just alphabetic characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Character_Classification .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Character Classification

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Not all
    languages have the concept of upper-case and lower-case
    characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The "C" ICU
    character classification functions are not fully
    internationalized[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Character_Classification_Examples .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Character Classification Examples

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The C++[
    UnicodeString]{.text-T21} methods do support internationalized
    processing of text[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[toUpper()]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[toLower()]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  []{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Character_Classification_Examples .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Character Classification Examples

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [        ]{.text-T21}[        ]{.text-T21}[\...]{.text-T21}

    [UnicodeString string("Hello!");]{.text-T18}

    [/\* Set to "hello!"]{.text-T18}

    [string.toLower();]{.text-T18}

    [        ]{.text-T21}[        ]{.text-T21}[\...]{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Character_Sorting .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Character Sorting]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Character
    sort order varies for different language and/or
    locations]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU
    supports four different strengths of
    sorting]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This gives
    flexibility to match "resume" to "résumé"]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Character_Sorting .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Character Sorting

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.853cm;width:22.437cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.079cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU
    comparison strength levels are:]{.text-T40}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Primary]{.text-T27}
        -- Matches if base letters are the same[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Secondary]{.text-T27}
        -- Matches if base letter and accents are the same[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Tertiary]{.text-T27}
        -- Matches if the case of the letters are the same (Default
        Strength)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Identical]{.text-T27}
        -- Only matches if exact same character/encoding[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ICU_Collator .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ICU Collator

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU uses a
    Collator class to sort characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#ICU_Collator_Creation .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ICU Collator Creation

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:23.072cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [C]{.text-T41}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [        ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T18}[\...]{.text-T18}

    [UCollator\* newCollator = ]{.text-T18}

    [        ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T18}[       
    ]{.text-T18}[ucol_open(NULL, &error);]{.text-T18}

    [        ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T18}[\...]{.text-T18}

    []{.text-T18}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_ICU_Collator_Creation .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More ICU Collator Creation]{.text-T26}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [C++]{.text-T41}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[\...]{.text-T24}

    [Collator\* newCollator =
    Collator::createInstance(error);]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[\...]{.text-T24}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}

:::

::: {#ICU_Collator_Removal .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  ICU Collator Removal

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [C]{.text-T27}

-   -   1.  [\...]{.text-T18}

1.  [        ]{.text-T18}[ucol_close(newCollator);]{.text-T18}

-   -   1.  [\...]{.text-T18}

1.  [C++]{.text-T27}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [        ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T18}[\...]{.text-T18}

    [        ]{.text-T18}[delete newCollator;]{.text-T18}

    [        ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T18}[\...]{.text-T18}

</div>
:::

:::

::: {#Collator_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Collator Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.853cm;width:24.553cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.846cm; top:5.079cm; "}
<div>

1.  [C]{.text-T27}

    [        ]{.text-T40}[        ]{.text-T40}[\...]{.text-T40}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [/\* Set the collation strength to primary]{.text-T24}

    [ucol_setStrength(newCollator,]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[   
        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[UCOL_PRIMARY);]{.text-T24}

    [/\* Compare source with target]{.text-T24}

    [u_strcoll(newCollator, source, src_len, ]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[   
        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[target,
    target_len);]{.text-T24}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [        ]{.text-T40}[        ]{.text-T40}[\...]{.text-T40}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}

:::

<div>

1.  Collator Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:25.4cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.635cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [C++]{.text-T27}

    [\...]{.text-T40}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [/\* Set the collation strength to primary]{.text-T42}

    [newCollator-\>setStrength(Collator::PRIMARY);]{.text-T42}

    [/\* Compare strings (they will compare!)]{.text-T42}

    [newCollator-\>compare("xyz", "XYZ");]{.text-T42}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [\...]{.text-T40}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}

</div>
:::
