::: {#Decomposed_Unicode_Characters .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Decomposed Unicode Characters

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Remember,
    some Unicode characters have two different forms[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Pre-composed
        (i.e., a single "ü" character)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}De-composed
        (i.e., a "u" followed by a "u" character[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Decomposed_Characters .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Decomposed Characters

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Default
    collation mode is set to compare pre-composed and decomposed
    character as the same characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Technical
    term is that the decomposition mode is set to
    "CANONICAL"[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Hyphenation .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Hyphenation]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    no support for internationalization of text
    hyphenation[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Delimiters .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Delimiters]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.853cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.079cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU provide
    the ]{.text-T6}[BreakIterator]{.text-T39}[ class to process text
    delimiters of international text]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[There are
    four types of ICU
    ]{.text-T6}[BreakIterator]{.text-T39}[:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        Boundary]{.text-T44}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Word
        Boundary ]{.text-T44}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Sentence
        Boundary]{.text-T44}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Line-break
        Position]{.text-T44}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Text_Delimiters .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Text Delimiters

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}You need to
    instantiate the particular type of BreakIterator:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}C++ Methods
    include:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}createCharacterInstance[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}createWordInstance[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}createSentenceInstance[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}createLineInstance[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page91 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Text Delimiters

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A
    [BreakIterator]{.text-T21} object is expensive to
    instantiate[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Don't create
    and delete them often[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#BreakIterator_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  BreakIterator Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.853cm;width:23.072cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.079cm; "}
<div>

1.  [        ]{.text-T40}[        ]{.text-T40}[\...]{.text-T40}

    [/\* Create Word Break Iterator Object \*/]{.text-T45}

    [BreakIterator\* brkit =
    BreakIterator::createWordInstance();]{.text-T45}

    [/\* Point to beginning of string \*/]{.text-T45}

    [brkit-\>setText(string);]{.text-T45}

    [UTextOffset ptr = brkit-\>first();]{.text-T45}

    [/\* Find next word break \*/]{.text-T45}

    [ptr = brkit-\>next();]{.text-T45}

    [}]{.text-T45}

    [        ]{.text-T40}[        ]{.text-T40}[\...]{.text-T40}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Punctuation .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Punctuation]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    no support for recognizing and processing international punctuation
    marks[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Capitalization .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Capitalization]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    no support for internationalization of text capitalization
    issues[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Search .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Search]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU can
    utilize the ]{.text-T6}[Collator]{.text-T39}[ class to implement an
    internationalized text search]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Spell_Checking .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Spell Checking]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    no support for internationalization of spell checking[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Fonts .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Fonts]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [  ]{.text-T46}[The following Internationalization issues exist for
    the use of Fonts:]{.text-T46}[ ]{.text-T47}

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Font
        Sets]{.text-T47}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Font]{.text-T47}[
        Size]{.text-T46}[\
        ]{.text-T46}[ ]{.text-T46}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Font_Sets .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Font Sets]{.text-T47}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    no explicit support for internationalization of font
    sets[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Font sets
    can be defined in ICU ResourceBundles[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Support can
    also be implemented in the accompanying C, C++ or Java
    code[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

:::

<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    no explicit support for internationalization of font
    sizes[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Font sizes
    can be defined in ICU ResourceBundles[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Support can
    also be implemented in the accompanying C, C++ or Java
    code[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

        of Formatted Information]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd}

::: {#Number_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Number Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:20.955cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU uses a
    ]{.text-T49}[NumberFormat]{.text-T50}[ class to provide
    international formats of numbers]{.text-T49}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[NumberFormat]{.text-T50}[
    class also supports percent and monetary
    formatting]{.text-T49}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Number_Format_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Number Format Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:24.342cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.058cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  \...

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [num_format = NumberFormat::createInstance( ]{.text-T18}[       
    ]{.text-T18}[        ]{.text-T18}[       
    ]{.text-T18}[Locale::Germany, status);]{.text-T18}

    [number = 12345.67;]{.text-T18}

    [cout \<\< num_format-\>format(number);]{.text-T18}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  \...

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    The program will display the number as:

    []{.text-T2}

    -   -   [12.345,67]{.text-T51}

    []{.text-T2}

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Number_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Number Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU also
    provide two addition number formatting classes:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[DecimalFormat]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[DecimalFormatSymbols]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}These
    classes are rarely used, and are not covered in this
    course[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Money_Format_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Money Format Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:23.918cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.847cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [        ]{.text-T52}[        ]{.text-T52}[\...]{.text-T52}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [money_format = NumberFormat::createCurrencyInstance( ]{.text-T53}[ 
          ]{.text-T53}[        ]{.text-T53}[       
    ]{.text-T53}[Locale::Germany, status);]{.text-T53}

    [value = 12345.67;]{.text-T53}

    [cout \<\< money_format-\>format(value);]{.text-T53}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [        ]{.text-T52}[        ]{.text-T52}[\...]{.text-T52}

    []{.text-T52}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    The program will display the monetary value as:

     

    -   -   [1.234,56 DM]{.text-T51}

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Percentage_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Percentage Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr13 style="height:10.795cm;width:23.918cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.482cm; top:5.502cm; "}
<div>

1.  [\...]{.text-T54}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [percent_format = NumberFormat::createPercentInstance(
    ]{.text-T53}[        ]{.text-T53}[        ]{.text-T53}[       
    ]{.text-T53}[Locale::Germany, status);]{.text-T53}

    [value = .12;]{.text-T53}

    [cout \<\< percent_format-\>format(value);]{.text-T53}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [        ]{.text-T54}[        ]{.text-T54}[\...]{.text-T54}

    []{.text-T54}

-   []{.text-T54}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

     

    The program will display the percentage value as:

     

    -   -   [12 %??]{.text-T51}

    []{.text-T2}

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Date_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Date Format]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU
    represents dates and times using the ]{.text-T6}[UDates]{.text-T39}[
     data type]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[UDates]{.text-T39}[
    stores the number of milliseconds since UTC January 1,
    1970]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Date_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Date Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU supports
    the internationalized formatting of the date and time with the
    [DateFormat ]{.text-T21}class[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Formatting
    of only the date can be instantiated with the
    [createDateInstance()]{.text-T21} method[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Date_Format_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Date Format Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:24.765cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.634cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [\...]{.text-T40}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [DateFormat\* dateform = DateFormat::
    createDateInstance();]{.text-T24}

    [UnicodeString formatted;]{.text-T24}

    [/\* Format UDate value into "formatted"\*/]{.text-T24}

    [dateform-\>format(UDate_value, ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[ 
          ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[formatted);]{.text-T24}

    [cout\<\< formatted \<\<endl;]{.text-T24}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [\...]{.text-T40}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    This code will format the UDate value into the local display of the
    LONG format (i.e., [June 12, 2001 ).]{.text-T55}

    []{.text-T55}

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Another_Date_Format_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Another Date Format Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:24.765cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.634cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [\...]{.text-T40}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [DateFormat\* dateform = DateFormat::]{.text-T24}

    [createDateInstance(]{.text-T24}[DateFormat::SHORT]{.text-T56}[);]{.text-T24}

    [UnicodeString formatted;]{.text-T24}

    [/\* Format UDate value into "formatted"\*/]{.text-T24}

    [dateform-\>format(UDate_value, ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}

    [                  ]{.text-T24}[formatted);]{.text-T24}

    [cout\<\< formatted \<\<endl;]{.text-T24}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [\...]{.text-T40}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P57 .graphic-pr12 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.  You can modify the format of the date by specifying it in the
    invocation of [createDateInstance]{.text-T57}.

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Other_Date_Classes .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Other Date Classes

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU supports
    two other date classes[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[SimpleDateFormat]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[DateFormatSymbols]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}These
    classes support customized date formats[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Address_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Address Format]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    no support for internationalization of address formats[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

<div>

1.  Telephone Number Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:20.744cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU
    provides no support for internationalization of telephone number
    formats]{.text-T49}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T49}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T49}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {#Personal_Names .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Personal Names]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    no support for internationalization of the display of personal
    names[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::

::: {#Personal_Titles .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Personal Titles]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    no support for internationalization of personal titles[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Input_of_Formatted_Information_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Input of Formatted Information ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A variety
    of ICU classes have a ]{.text-T6}[parse()]{.text-T39}[ method to
    read the local format of the information:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[DateFormat]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[SimpleDateFormat]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[NumberFormat]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[DecimalFormat]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[MessageFormat]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

        Savings Time]{.text-T44}[]{.odfLiEnd}

::: {#Weekdays .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Weekdays]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU
    supports internationalization of weekday name using the
    SimpleDateFormat class]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>

::: {#More_Weekdays .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Weekdays]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:23.072cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [\...]{.text-T39}

    [SimpleDateFormat mySDF = ]{.text-T59}

    [        ]{.text-T59}[        ]{.text-T59}[        ]{.text-T59}[   
        ]{.text-T59}[new SimpleDateFormat();]{.text-T59}

    [DateFormatSymbols myDFS = ]{.text-T59}

    [        ]{.text-T59}[        ]{.text-T59}[       
    ]{.text-T59}[mySDF.getDateFormatSymbols();]{.text-T59}

    [String weekdays\[\] = ]{.text-T59}

    [        ]{.text-T59}[        ]{.text-T59}[        ]{.text-T59}[   
        ]{.text-T59}[myDFS.getWeekdays();]{.text-T59}

    [\...]{.text-T39}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P57 .graphic-pr12 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    Local weekday names will be loaded in the the [weekdays]{.text-T38}
    array, with the first day of the week loaded into
    [weekdays\[1\].]{.text-T38}

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Months .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Months]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU
    supports a comparable ]{.text-T6}[DateFormatSymbols]{.text-T39}[
    method ]{.text-T6}[getMonths()]{.text-T39}[ to get the local names
    of months]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

:::

::: {#Years .page-dp3}

<div>

1.  [Years]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The ICU
    ]{.text-T6}[SimpleDateFormat]{.text-T39}[ class uses a user-defined
    date format pattern to display the local year
    value]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU also
    supports a ]{.text-T6}[Calendar]{.text-T39}[ class to support the
    Gregorian calendar]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{.text-T6}

</div>

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::

::: {#Time_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Time Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU supports
    the internationalized formatting of the time with the [DateFormat
    ]{.text-T21}class[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Formatting
    of only the time can be instantiated with the
    [createTimeInstance()]{.text-T21} method[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Time_Format_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Time Format Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:24.765cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.634cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.     \...

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [DateFormat\* timeform = DateFormat::
    createTimeInstance();]{.text-T24}

    [String formatted;]{.text-T24}

    [/\* Format time value into "formatted"\*/]{.text-T24}

    [timeform-\>format(UDate_value,formatted);]{.text-T24}

    [cout\<\< formatted \<\<endl;]{.text-T24}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.     \...

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P57 .graphic-pr12 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    This code will format the time value into the local display of the
    LONG format.

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Time_Zones .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Time Zones]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[ICU support
    two classes to support time zones:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[TimeZone]{.text-T39}[
        -- abstract base class]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[SimpleTimeZone]{.text-T39}[
        -- implements standard time zones]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[TimeZone]{.text-T39}[
    classes are related to ]{.text-T6}[UDate]{.text-T39}[,
    ]{.text-T6}[Calendar]{.text-T39}[ classes and
    ]{.text-T6}[DateFormat]{.text-T39}[ classes]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Time_Zone_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Time Zone Example

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [        ]{.text-T40} \...

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [/\* Use the LONG version of TZ name \*/]{.text-T42}

    [cal_timezone = new TimeZone(]{.text-T42}

    [        ]{.text-T42}[        ]{.text-T42}[       
    ]{.text-T42}["]{.text-T42}[Pacific Standard Time");]{.text-T42}

    [/\* Use SHORT version of the TZ Name \*/]{.text-T42}

    [cal_Stimezone = new TimeZone("PST");]{.text-T42}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
1.  [        ]{.text-T40}[        ]{.text-T40}\...

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::

    Savings Time is supported by the ]{.text-T6}[TimeZone]{.text-T39}[

    definition of envelope size can be stored in a
    ResourceBundle[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {#Transliteration .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Transliteration

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Transliteration
    is the conversion of phonetic pronunciation from one script to
    another:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr10 style="height:7.141cm;width:16.509cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:5.503cm; top:10.16cm; "}
+:---------------------------------+:---------------------------------+
| 1.  [Script]{.text-T15}          | 1.  [Transliteration]{.text-T15} |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [Japanese Kanji              | 1.  [日本語]{.text-T36}          |
|     characters]{.text-T16}       |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [Japanese Hiragana           | 1.  [にほんご]{.text-T36}        |
|     characters]{.text-T16}       |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [U.S. English Alphabetic     | 1.  [nihongo]{.text-T16}         |
|     characters]{.text-T16}       |                                  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:7.141cm;width:16.509cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Transliteration .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Transliteration

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Transliteration
    is [NOT]{.text-T27} translation\![]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Transliteration
    is a specialized operation, not commonly seen in internationalized
    applications[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Transliteration_Classes .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:17.356cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.562cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Transliteration Classes

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ICU provides
    the following transliteration classes:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Transliterator[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}CompoundTransliterator[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}HexToUnicodeTransliterator[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}RuleBasedTransliterator[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}UnicodeToHexTransliterator[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.   

    For more information about ICU Transliteration, checkout the
    website:

     

    oss.software.ibm.com/icu/userguide/Transliteration.html

</div>
:::
:::
